name: rpg-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace for RPG campaigns.

plugins.name: rpg-vault-guardian
plugins.description: Obsidian vault integrity guardian for RPG campaigns.

plugins.name: rpg-loremaster
plugins.description: Build dark-leaning PF2e campaigns end to end: campaign spine, regions/nations, cities, factions, locations, NPCs, artifacts/relics, clue maps, and an interactive conductor + a consistency-reviewer subagent.

plugins.name: rpg-gamemaster
plugins.description: Session prep and run layer for PF2e campaigns — session zero / party builder, runnable sessions, fronts and clocks, balanced encounters, non-combat challenges (Victory Points), and a GM run sheet.

plugins.name: rpg-foundry-forge
plugins.description: Compile a validated RPG vault into a playable Foundry VTT session via the foundry-vtt-mcp server — scenes and lighting, creature actors with token placement, quest/lore/dashboard journals, player ownership, encounters, and non-combat challenges (challenge journal + live rolls + VP clock); idempotent and resumable via an on-disk build manifest.
